title: Cristobal's Gold
writer: Carl Koch, Jean Renoir, Albert T'Sterstevens
actors: Charles Vanel, Conchita Montenegro, Albert Préjean
plot: Based on the novel by Albert t'Serstevens. Dupuy, the first mate of the French freighter "Cristobal" is informed by cabaret dancer La Rubia that the "Cristobal" carries a priceless secret cargo of gold.
